title: notifications
subHeroTitle: Filter distraction. Stay aligned on deliverables.
subHeroDesc: Stay in the loop without being overwhelmed. KeilHQ filters alerts intelligently so you only hear about critical updates that impact your work, using sub-50ms WebSocket pipelines.
capabilitiesDesc: KeilHQ provides granular notification controls so you only hear about critical updates that impact your sprint items.

capabilitiesGrid.title: Triggers
capabilitiesGrid.desc: Get notified when a task is assigned to you, a message is received, a note is shared, status changes, or you are mentioned.

capabilitiesGrid.title: Unread Badges
capabilitiesGrid.desc: Stay updated on pending notifications at a glance with clean unread count badges in the workspace sidebar.

capabilitiesGrid.title: Clear Controls
capabilitiesGrid.desc: Declutter your notification tray instantly with dedicated mark-all-read and clear-all action items.

capabilitiesGrid.title: Preferences
capabilitiesGrid.desc: Configure custom user-specific notification filters to control exactly what updates trigger a workspace notification.

checklistTitle: Keep your team focused on execution
checklistDesc: Eliminate general notification fatigue. Fast WebSocket pipelines deliver direct in-app updates instantly.
checklistItems: WebSocket infrastructure syncs in-app alerts across tabs in under 50ms.,
Subscribe to specific client files, tasks, or spaces to track updates.,
Enterprise-grade role limits prevent workspace notification leaks.,
Custom notification silence intervals for uninterrupted focus sessions.,
